figures.caption: FIG. 3. Time evolution of the average the eg-orbital occupancy difference (a) JT mode ⟨Q3,R⟩ (a) at NiL with solid and NiS with dashed lines for several pump fluences, during and after photoexcitation with light polarized along êz.
